user.name: xmayeth
user.description: trading addict | growing capital in DeFi | prediction market visionary

content:
I gave Claude one prompt - and by morning it made $3000 on Polymarket.

The whole build took 2 hours.

The scariest part - anyone can do this.

Simple mechanic: you place YES and NO orders - and collect rewards.

I had no idea what would happen next. The bot just started placing orders on both sides.

Three scenarios:

1. Neither order filled —> you just collect Rewards every day. This is the main income.

2. One filled  —> bot instantly hedges on the opposite side. YES + NO < or = $1.02 - profitable in any outcome.

3. Both filled  —> fully hedged. One contract pays $1, position closed.

At some point I closed the laptop. The bot didn't need me anymore.

Works best on niche markets with low competition.
Primaries, minor sports, regional referendums.

Your share of the pool is significantly larger there.

Anyone with Claude and 2 free hours can repeat this today.

The only question is: how motivated are you to actually do it?
